task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that sets environment variables, specifies a timeout of 60 seconds, and allocates 512 MB of memory
Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM policy document (as a dictionary) and returns a list of all the resource ARNs specified in the policy
